overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a foggy night walk through a neon-lit dystopian city. The player character exits a concrete underpass and traverses a sidewalk lined with holographic advertisements, passing a pharmacy and street vendors while skyscrapers loom overhead in the dense fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete pedestrian underpass with support pillars

events.description: approaching the foggy exit of the covered underpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit concrete corridor toward the street exit

entered.detail: massive rectangular concrete pillars lining both sides of the underpass
linear overhead lights illuminating the corridor with cool white light
wet reflective concrete pavement with scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow concrete underpass with massive support pillars and overhead fluorescent lighting. The player walks forward through the dim corridor toward a foggy exit visible in the distance, with wet pavement reflecting the artificial lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy commercial street with holographic advertisements

events.description: exits the underpass into the open foggy street with neon signage
passing Shirley's Pharmacy with bright green neon signage on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following a pedestrian in an orange jacket through the foggy neon-lit street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking ahead of the player on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall holographic display showing a pink neon female figure
green neon sign reading 'Shirley's Pharmacy' with medical cross symbol
vertical holographic billboard with abstract geometric patterns
tall pole with bright overhead street lighting

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens into a foggy neon-lit commercial street. Holographic advertisements glow through the mist, including a prominent pink figure display. The player follows a pedestrian in an orange jacket past Shirley's Pharmacy with its distinctive green neon signage, while sparse traffic moves along the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with traffic barriers and towering skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at fog-covered skyscrapers disappearing into the haze

agents.ego_description: walking along the barrier-lined sidewalk while looking up at the massive skyscrapers looming overhead in the dense fog

entered.detail: bright orange metal barriers separating the sidewalk from the street
holographic billboard displaying 'BOTTOMS UP' with a muscular figure
tall palm trees silhouetted against the foggy background
massive tower buildings with illuminated windows rising into the fog

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk opens up with orange traffic barriers lining the right side. The player walks past a 'Bottoms Up' holographic advertisement while massive skyscrapers loom overhead, their tops disappearing into the dense fog. Around the 30-second mark, the camera tilts upward to emphasize the scale of the towers above.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching intersection with food vendor

events.description: passing a lit street vendor cart with red umbrella and neon menu

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past a street vendor and approaching a traffic intersection

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at illuminated food cart under a red umbrella

entered.detail: food cart with red umbrella and illuminated menu display
large directional road sign above the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the foggy sidewalk past a street vendor's cart with a red umbrella and glowing menu. The orange barriers continue alongside as the player approaches a traffic intersection with visible road signs. The dense fog obscures distant buildings, creating an intimate neon-lit corridor effect.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic confines of a concrete underpass into a sprawling, neon-drenched dystopian street. It begins by moving through a dim corridor of massive support pillars and fluorescent lights, where wet pavement reflects the artificial glow toward a foggy exit. As the camera emerges from the underpass, the environment expands into a misty commercial district filled with glowing holographic advertisements and the green neon signage of Shirley's Pharmacy. The scene then opens further along a sidewalk lined with orange traffic barriers, where the camera tilts upward to reveal massive skyscrapers disappearing into the dense overhead fog. Finally, the movement continues past a street vendor's red umbrella and glowing menu toward a traffic intersection, as the thick mist closes in to create an intimate, neon-lit corridor.
